task_completion.description: Verify that the medical record for patient Ana Isabel Betz (PUID: GNU777ORG) has been accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GNU Health client should display the patient's main chart or demographic page showing the name 'Ana Isabel Betz' and/or PUID 'GNU777ORG'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new lab test result for HbA1c with a value of 9.4% has been entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A lab test or evaluation screen showing 'HbA1c' (or 'HBA1C') with a recorded result/value of '9.4'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a condition for poor glycemic control using an ICD-10 E10.x code is documented in the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A condition, diagnosis, or pathology entry in the patient's record showing an ICD-10 code starting with 'E10' (e.g., E10.9, E10.65) related to Type 1 diabetes or poor glycemic control.

task_completion.description: Verify that an insulin prescription has been added to the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A medication or prescription entry showing an insulin product (e.g., 'insulin', 'lispro', 'glargine', 'novolog', 'humalog', 'lantus').

task_completion.description: Verify that an urgent follow-up appointment is scheduled within 7-28 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment scheduling screen or calendar entry for Ana Isabel Betz with Dr. Cameron Cordara, showing a date that is 7 to 28 days in the future.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the GNU Health graphical user interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GNU Health desktop client windows, menus, and forms being actively used, rather than terminal windows or database command lines.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not simply type the requirements into a text editor or notepad.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs (9.4%, E10 codes, insulin, appointment dates) must be entered into the appropriate fields within the GNU Health application, not a generic text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use direct SQL queries or scripts to insert the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running psql, sqlite3, or python scripts to bypass the GNU Health application interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Ana Isabel Betz. Patient PUID: GNU777ORG. Health Professional: Cameron Cordara. Lab Type: HBA1C. Expected Lab Result: 9.4 (acceptable range in backend is 9.0 to 9.8). Condition Code: Must start with E10 (ICD-10 family). Prescribed Drug: Must be an insulin class medication (e.g., insulin, lispro, glargine, novolog, humalog, lantus). Follow-up Appointment: Must be scheduled between 7 and 28 days from the current system date.
